---
title: "stability.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\stability.py"
loc: 112
complexity: 17
logic_score: 4.58
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 3.58
---

## Intent
The `stability.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on GungnirValidator, __init__, record_trial, status, TheWatcher, __init__, _load_state, _save_state, is_locked, record_edit, get_last_edit_time, record_failure. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GungnirValidator, __init__, record_trial, status, TheWatcher, __init__, _load_state, _save_state, is_locked, record_edit, get_last_edit_time, record_failure. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [hashlib](file://hashlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [math](file://math)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `GungnirValidator`
- `__init__`
- `record_trial`
- `status`
- `TheWatcher`
- `__init__`
- `_load_state`
- `_save_state`
- `is_locked`
- `record_edit`
- `get_last_edit_time`
- `record_failure`
